title: Multiversal Craft
description: This Modpack is designed for those looking for something enjoyable, but not overly complicated
body: MVC is a Project Designed to be fun, but somewhat simple in a way that most people can play it even with out knowing much about the mods. When you play this for the first time you will be given starter gear which can help you progress within this modpack, everything else is up to you to decide as you relax with a peaceful farm or adventuring the choice is yours! **"Note This modpack is still in development if you notice anything that can be changed or improved feel free to let me know in my discord!"**
